Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$file = 'C:\\\\Users\\\\LJG\\\\Desktop\\\\BusanOn_v2\\\\src\\\\main\\\\resources\\\\mappers\\\\BusinessMapper.xml'
\\$content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\(\\$file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
\\$old = '     , \(SELECT IFNULL\( MIN\(CAST\(RM_PRICE AS UNSIGNED\)\) , 0\)' + \\"\\`n\\" + '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t  FROM PENSION_ROOM' + \\"\\`n\\" + '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t WHERE PEN_ID = P.PEN_ID\) AS RM_PRICE'
\\$new = '     , \(SELECT IFNULL\( MIN\(CAST\(RM_PRICE AS UNSIGNED\)\) , 0\)' + \\"\\`n\\" + '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t  FROM PENSION_ROOM' + \\"\\`n\\" + '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t WHERE PEN_ID = P.PEN_ID\) AS RM_PRICE' + \\"\\`n\\" + '\\t\\t\\t     , \(SELECT IFNULL\( MAX\(CAST\(RM_PRICE AS UNSIGNED\)\) , 0\)' + \\"\\`n\\" + '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t  FROM PENSION_ROOM' + \\"\\`n\\" + '\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t WHERE PEN_ID = P.PEN_ID\) AS RM_PRICE_MAX'
if \(\\$content.Contains\(\\$old\)\) {
    \\$newContent = \\$content.Replace\(\\$old, \\$new\)
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\\$file, \\$newContent, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
    Write-Host 'SUCCESS'
} else {
    Write-Host 'NOT FOUND'
    \\$idx = \\$content.IndexOf\('RM_PRICE'\)
    Write-Host \\$content.Substring\(\\$idx-10, 100\)
}
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$file = 'C:\\\\Users\\\\LJG\\\\Desktop\\\\BusanOn_v2\\\\src\\\\main\\\\resources\\\\mappers\\\\BusinessMapper.xml'
\\$content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\(\\$file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
\\$t5 = [string]\([char]9\)*5
\\$t3 = [string]\([char]9\)*3
\\$lf = [char]10
\\$old = 'MIN\(CAST\(RM_PRICE AS UNSIGNED\)\) , 0\)' + \\$lf + \\$t5 + '  FROM PENSION_ROOM' + \\$lf + \\$t5 + ' WHERE PEN_ID = P.PEN_ID\) AS RM_PRICE'
\\$new = 'MIN\(CAST\(RM_PRICE AS UNSIGNED\)\) , 0\)' + \\$lf + \\$t5 + '  FROM PENSION_ROOM' + \\$lf + \\$t5 + ' WHERE PEN_ID = P.PEN_ID\) AS RM_PRICE' + \\$lf + \\$t3 + '     , \(SELECT IFNULL\( MAX\(CAST\(RM_PRICE AS UNSIGNED\)\) , 0\)' + \\$lf + \\$t5 + '  FROM PENSION_ROOM' + \\$lf + \\$t5 + ' WHERE PEN_ID = P.PEN_ID\) AS RM_PRICE_MAX'
if \(\\$content.Contains\(\\$old\)\) {
    \\$newContent = \\$content.Replace\(\\$old, \\$new\)
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\\$file, \\$newContent, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
    Write-Host 'SUCCESS'
} else {
    Write-Host 'NOT FOUND'
}
")

$old = 'INSERT INTO PENSION\(' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*6 + 'PEN_ID,' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + 'USER_ID,' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + 'USER_TYPE,' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + 'PEN_NAME,' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + 'PEN_ADDRESS,' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + 'PEN_ZIPCODE,' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + 'PEN_NUMBER' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*6 + '\)' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*2 + 'VALUES\(' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*3 + '#{PEN_ID},' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + '#{USER_ID},' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + '#{USER_TYPE},' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + '#{PEN_NAME},' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + '#{PEN_ADDRESS},' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + '#{PEN_ZIPCODE},' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*7 + '#{PEN_NUMBER}\)' + [char]10 + [string]\([char]9\)*1
Write-Host 'Old string length:' $old.Length
if \(\\$content.Contains\(\\$old\)\) { Write-Host 'FOUND' } else { Write-Host 'NOT FOUND' }
")
